docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO MAR-05-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C TRIAL OF JAN-30-1996 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WADLEY, AVALON
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-05-1996, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-09-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
PLFT TO FILE DIMISSAL IF DEFT HAS PAID PLFT BY 4/9/96. COURT MAY HAVE MISCALCULATED AMOUNT DUE AT 3/5/96 HEARING. THE CORRECT AMT. IS $1527.69.
AMOUNT IS CALCULATED AS FOLLOWS: $1507.69 (AMOUNT OF CLAIM) PLUS $70.00 COURT COSTS MINUS $50.00 PAYMENT MADE BY DEFT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WADLEY, AVALON $1,527.69 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,612.69, DEFT'S NAME IS CORRECTED TO WADLEY, AVALON STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERG PETITION MAILED ON AUG 22, 1997
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,507.69 FILED BY AMERG AS TO DEFENDANT WADLEY, AVALON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERG
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $660.92 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $127.76 ACCRUED INTEREST, $100.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT WADLEY, AVALON
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WADLEY, AVALON
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,222.41 AS TO DEFENDANT WADLEY, AVALON
